[[General/Legends|General]] [[Orma Hundeen]], along with [[Zeela Nall]], [[Nuri Pravada]], '''Sheyne Tyndos''', and [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa]] were on a mission on [[Elerion]] to recover the holocube map containing the location of Rebel main bases from [[Nescan Tal'yo]], [[Hermos (droid)|Hermos]], and [[Gogol (owner)|Gogol]].
